Home of Legendary Carne Asada & Big Cravings

Big Burritos. Bold Flavor. San Diego Born.

gift cardsOrder Online

Home of Legendary Carne Asada & Big Cravings

gift cardsOrder Online

Where Big Burritos Rule Since ’93

Welcome to Rolberto’s Taco Shop, a family-owned San Diego favorite serving bold Mexican flavors since 1993. Known for our legendary carne asada burritos and fries and all-day breakfast burritos, we keep it fresh, filling, and full of flavor. Stop by and enjoy local favorites like our Surf & Turf Burrito, Rolled Tacos, and Crispy Beef Tacos—made the Rolberto’s way, always.

our menu

My family has been eating here since I attended adams elemtary in the early 2000s. They have the best carne asada fries.

Jennifer R.

Patronize this place - the last remnant of the pre-gentrified Normal Heights on this strip mall. All its neighbors have been replaced by hipster restaurants.

DV N.

Food is delicious and made with love. I highly suggest. Everyone is also respectful and nice.

Raquel

Address

 3462 Adams Ave, San Diego, CA 92116

Business Hours

Monday - Sunday: 6 AM - 3 AM

Contact Us

 (619) 563-0438
